title: verbascum pumilum
intro: Verbascum pumilum, also known as the dwarf mullein or small mullein, is a perennial plant in the figwort family native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its high content of antioxidants and flavonoids. The health benefits of Verbascum pumilum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, and its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Verbascum pumilum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
